channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dreadful state - Full of Potholes, 12th April
item.description:
Dreadful state - Full of Potholes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Great Suffolk Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Camber slopes towards the road, 12th April
item.description:
The pavement Camber slopes dangerously towards the road side on the pavement on the west side of the road making it very difficult and dangerous to push buggies and wheelchairs especially on the steep hill and especially as it is a busy path that often has people passing in both directions putting one close to the road edge. There is a risk of someone rolling into the road into the busy incoming traffic. Please could you even it out to be flat so it is easier for disabled people to move up and down the street without being at risk of rolling into the road. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Lower Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped gas canisters nr children’s play area !!, 12th April
item.description:
Whilst taking my young Grandchildren to the park this afternoon I saw a large number of Dumped large helium gas canisters/ boxes left by the hedge inside the entrance to Westheath recreational ground at the Clovelly Road entrance , DA7, I am very concerned that these could cause injury to children investigating them when using the park & request they be removed urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clovelly Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven paving in multiple places along the only pavement along that end of road, 12th April
item.description:
I have used this road to take a wheelchair several times a week along from the station and the pavement has multiple areas where the tarmac is uneven causing a tipping hazard at any speed and means the attendant has to tip the chair back slightly to be able to go up the lip near the cracks by the lamp posts in several places. Please can you even it out smoothly as it is the only way around from this road to the main road for disabled people
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Lower Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many potholes, 12th April
item.description:
Many ptholes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Pepper Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 134 Carlton house Albert road nw6 5d u, 12th April
item.description:
Well over a decade ago there was a shed fire well documented by fire brigade “ because the smoke damage I’s atrocious going straight up the front of this block of flats and yet Brent council has not painted this eyesore “ just because it’s a old block of flats you have disregarded the long term tenants massively it’s making these flats looked dirty scruffy an shameful to live in such squalor very shameful Brent council your putting posh flats priority an ignored the old time tenants disgraceful “”

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Terrace, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped behind bins outside Lidl, 12th April
item.description:
Bins outside Lidl have had furniture dumped behind them on the grass area outside Lidl..please remove.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two electric scooters in the river, 12th April
item.description:
There are two electric scooters thrown into the lake by the five arches bridge, one black and one bright blue, plus there is also a golf club in the same place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Five Arches, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in Garden Shed, 12th April
item.description:
Dead fox in Garden Shed
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Green Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped gas cannister in the kerb outside Redlands Court, 12th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15;15a, London Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 134 Carlton house Albert rd nw6 5du, 12th April
item.description:
This problem has been there well over years not months, why has the Brent council ignored this problem because it’s a old block of flats Brent council accepts it’s ok to use this block as a dumping ground for anybody to dump here , I’ve contacted the media an they shocked an told me to give them any information Brent council says about this complaint my mum is 84 years old and frighthend to leave the block because of the rats it’s disgraceful so unfair because it’s a old block Brent council have failed dramatically, i say remove this refuse immediately “” also apologise to all us tenants “

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Terrace, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Has this work been forgotten?, 12th April
item.description:
This mess has been in the park for over a year with no progress. Will it ever be finished? It's just a mess currently with no clear view of what is being fixed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Place Park, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need support, 12th April

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St George's Road, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping outside property, 12th April
item.description:
A mass amount of rubbish has been dumped outside of 194-196 Kingsland Road, no use of bin bags either, books, pills, shoes, etc all just dumped on the pavement and some overspilling into the road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: They are taking the piss now - paints and all sorts left outside No. 13, 12th April
item.description:
Ridiculous!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
